tasks.label: restart-fastapi-backend
args: $pid = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if ($pid) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force }; Set-Location 'c:\Users\Hp\OneDrive\Desktop\MetaHackaThon-main'; python -m uvicorn app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
